page.title: My Profile
page.subtitle: View and update your account information.

errors.updateFailed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.descriptionMustChange: You must set a new password before continuing.
changePassword.temporaryPasswordNotice: A temporary password was set for your account. Please change it now.

fields.newPasswordHint: Use at least 8 characters and choose something different from your current password.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: API keys let you authenticate API requests without using your session cookies. Treat them like passwords — never share them.
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.

yourKeys.title: Your keys
yourKeys.description: Keys are shown with only the first 8 characters for identification.

createDialog.title: Create API key
createDialog.description: Give your key a descriptive name so you can identify it later.

revealDialog.title: API key created
revealDialog.description: Copy your new key now. You won't be able to see it again.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API key
revokeDialog.confirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to revoke
revokeDialog.confirmSuffix: ? Any requests using this key will stop working immediately.

errors.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.createFailed: Failed to create key. Please try again.
errors.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please copy the key manually.
